'''âch-b-r''' ('''kachabar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tirl|tirl]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-b-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tirl|tirl]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âch-b-r
|-
! Lemma
| kachabar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichabar|thichabar]] || [[word:jichabar|jichabar]] || [[word:shichabar|shichabar]] || [[word:kichabar|kichabar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchabar|thuthuchabar]] || [[word:jujuchabar|jujuchabar]] || [[word:shushuchabar|shushuchabar]] || [[word:kukuchabar|kukuchabar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchabar|thuchabar]] || [[word:juchabar|juchabar]] || [[word:shuchabar|shuchabar]] || [[word:kuchabar|kuchabar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchabar|thuchabar]] || [[word:juchabar|juchabar]] || [[word:shuchabar|shuchabar]] || [[word:kuchabar|kuchabar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechabar|thechabar]] || [[word:jechabar|jechabar]] || [[word:shechabar|shechabar]] || [[word:kechabar|kechabar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochabar|thothochabar]] || [[word:jojochabar|jojochabar]] || [[word:shoshochabar|shoshochabar]] || [[word:kokochabar|kokochabar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochabar|thochabar]] || [[word:jochabar|jochabar]] || [[word:shochabar|shochabar]] || [[word:kochabar|kochabar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochabar|thochabar]] || [[word:jochabar|jochabar]] || [[word:shochabar|shochabar]] || [[word:kochabar|kochabar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠchabar|thĂŠchabar]] || [[word:jĂŠchabar|jĂŠchabar]] || [[word:shĂŠchabar|shĂŠchabar]] || [[word:kĂŠchabar|kĂŠchabar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachabar|thathachabar]] || [[word:jajachabar|jajachabar]] || [[word:shashachabar|shashachabar]] || [[word:kakachabar|kakachabar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachabar|thachabar]] || [[word:jachabar|jachabar]] || [[word:shachabar|shachabar]] || [[word:kachabar|kachabar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachabar|thachabar]] || [[word:jachabar|jachabar]] || [[word:shachabar|shachabar]] || [[word:kachabar|kachabar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachabar|shachabar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachabar|goshachabar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachabar|gokishachabar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachabarnĂŒ|shachabarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachabarnknĂŒ|goshachabarnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachabarnĂŒ|gokishachabarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachabarshĂ«|shachabarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachabarnkshĂ«|goshachabarnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachabarshĂ«|gokishachabarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachabaro|shachabaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachabarnkro|goshachabarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachabaro|gokishachabaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachabarmu|shachabarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachabarnkmu|goshachabarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachabarmu|gokishachabarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachabarsher|shachabarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachabarnksher|goshachabarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachabarsher|gokishachabarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachabarng|shachabarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachabarnkng|goshachabarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachabarng|gokishachabarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachabarya|shachabarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachabarnkya|goshachabarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachabarya|gokishachabarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachabaryam|shachabaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachabarnkyam|goshachabarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachabaryam|gokishachabaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachabarnĂŒshĂ«|shachabarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachabarnknĂŒshĂ«|goshachabarnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachabarnĂŒshĂ«|gokishachabarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachabarnĂŒro|shachabarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachabarnknĂŒro|goshachabarnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachabarnĂŒro|gokishachabarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachabarnĂŒmu|shachabarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachabarnknĂŒmu|goshachabarnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachabarnĂŒmu|gokishachabarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachabarshĂ«nĂŒ|shachabarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachabarnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshachabarnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachabarshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishachabarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachabarshĂ«ro|shachabarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachabarnkshĂ«ro|goshachabarnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachabarshĂ«ro|gokishachabarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachabarshĂ«mu|shachabarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachabarnkshĂ«mu|goshachabarnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachabarshĂ«mu|gokishachabarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachabaronĂŒ|shachabaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachabarnkronĂŒ|goshachabarnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachabaronĂŒ|gokishachabaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachabaroshĂ«|shachabaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachabarnkroshĂ«|goshachabarnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachabaroshĂ«|gokishachabaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachabaromu|shachabaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachabarnkromu|goshachabarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachabaromu|gokishachabaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachabarmunĂŒ|shachabarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachabarnkmunĂŒ|goshachabarnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachabarmunĂŒ|gokishachabarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachabarmushĂ«|shachabarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachabarnkmushĂ«|goshachabarnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachabarmushĂ«|gokishachabarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachabarmuro|shachabarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachabarnkmuro|goshachabarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachabarmuro|gokishachabarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|97f1258}}
